title: mfa — settings
description: Tenant-facing MFA policy settings. Two groups: tenant-level MFA policy (which roles require MFA, grace period, step-up strictness) + per-user MFA preferences (preferred method, low-recovery-codes threshold override). Only tenant admins with the `mfa.policy.manage` permission can modify the tenant-level group.

namespace_registration.defaultValueFactory: Delegates to config('mfa.*') when the tenant hasn't overridden. Ensures the effective value falls back to the config layer if no tenant-specific row exists.
namespace_registration.validator: Enforces the compliance-floor rules — tenant settings can only TIGHTEN mfa.required_for_roles (add more roles, never remove any); tenant settings can only SHORTEN mfa.grace_days_after_enrollment; tenant settings can only SHORTEN mfa.step_up.sensitive_action_ttl_minutes.

groups.label: Two-factor authentication
groups.description: Tenant-wide MFA policy. Compliance floor: the tenant can only TIGHTEN these values, never loosen below the platform floor.

sections.label: Required roles
sections.description: Users holding any listed role must have MFA enrolled. Grace period gives newly-elevated users time to enrol before enforcement.

fields.name: additional_required_roles
fields.label: Additional roles requiring MFA
fields.helpText: Platform floor: owner, admin, billing_manager, super_admin (always required). Add more roles here to widen enforcement.

fields.name: grace_days_after_enrollment
fields.label: Grace period (days)
fields.helpText: How long a newly-elevated user has to enrol MFA before enforcement. Platform max: 7 days. Set to 0 for immediate enforcement.

sections.label: Step-up verification
sections.description: Require a fresh MFA challenge before sensitive actions.

fields.name: step_up_ttl_minutes
fields.label: Freshness window
fields.helpText: How long after an MFA challenge a sensitive action is allowed without re-challenging.

sections.label: WebAuthn policy
sections.description: Fine-tune the WebAuthn behaviour for your tenant.

fields.name: webauthn_user_verification
fields.label: User-verification policy
fields.helpText: Whether the authenticator MUST verify the user (PIN, biometric). Required makes WebAuthn a full MFA on its own.

fields.name: webauthn_require_resident_key
fields.label: Require passkey-style credentials (resident keys)
fields.helpText: On = only passkeys accepted (no classic YubiKeys). Off = accept both roaming keys and passkeys.

fields.name: webauthn_max_credentials
fields.label: Maximum credentials per user
fields.helpText: Platform max: 10. Free tier caps at 1 (upgrade to team+ for multiple).

fields.name: recovery_codes_low_water_threshold
fields.label: Low-code alert threshold
fields.helpText: Send a reminder when a user's remaining recovery-code count falls below this value.

fields.name: notify_suspicious_activity
fields.label: Send suspicious-activity alerts
fields.helpText: Emails users when their MFA sees rapid failed challenges from novel IPs.

fields.name: preferred_challenge_method
fields.label: Preferred challenge method at login
fields.helpText: When you have multiple factors enrolled, which one to prompt for first.

fields.name: hide_recovery_codes_reminder
fields.label: Hide low-recovery-codes reminders
fields.helpText: Suppress the periodic nudge to regenerate. You'll still see the in-app dot when only a few codes remain.
